curation_notes: Patch commit 400c226 adds a _is_path() helper and a check in HTTPDatasetSource.load() to reject filenames containing path separators from the Content-Disposition header. Only one non-test source file (mlflow/data/http_dataset_source.py) was modified. No sibling dataset source files share the same vulnerability pattern — FileSystemDatasetSource is abstract and others do not extract filenames from HTTP headers. Pre-assigned class path-traversal confirmed: CWE-22/CWE-23 and the patch both clearly address unsanitized file path input.
